constraints.layout_style: fieldset stacks with legend-only section titles

required_complexity_patterns.notes: Combobox: button or input with aria-haspopup=listbox plus listbox/options
Fields inside details/summary or hidden until click
Label text split across multiple spans with no space between words
Custom text field: div with role=textbox and contenteditable, no native input
At least two fields with aria-label only and no visible label element

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, small, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: Combobox: button or input with aria-haspopup=listbox plus listbox/options Required: Fields inside details/summary or hidden until click Required: Label text split across multiple spans with no space between words Required: Custom text field: div with role=textbox and contenteditable, no native input Required: At least two fields with aria-label only and no visible label element Reference DOM (Tab panel hidden fields): Fields in inactive tab panel hidden until tab clicked Reference DOM (CSS hidden wizard steps): Multi-step wizard with only one step visible via CSS class toggling Reference DOM (Table layout form): Form laid out as HTML table with labels in td cells Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: custom-combobox, details-accordion, glued-label-text, div-role-textbox, aria-label-only. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: fieldset stacks with legend-only section titles. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: Tab panel hidden fields; CSS hidden wizard steps; Table layout form.
